message:
feat(ftui): spring-based animation infrastructure and screenshot export (2noh9.4.14)

Add comprehensive spring physics animation system to the TUI, replacing
hard-timed linear animations with natural-feeling spring dynamics:

Animation infrastructure (AnimationState):
- Spring-based focus flash (stiffness 280, damping 22) replaces 220ms linear timer
- Peek badge show/hide via spring interpolation instead of hard cutoff
- Panel resize spring for smooth 70/30↔50/50 split transitions
- Modal open/close spring (stiffness 350, damping 24) for scale+fade
- Staggered reveal springs for result list items (up to 15 items, decreasing
  stiffness per slot for cascading entrance effect)
- Master kill-switch via CASS_DISABLE_ANIMATIONS=1 env var (snaps to targets)
- All springs ticked on CassMsg::Tick with proper dt delta tracking

Screenshot export feature:
- Three output formats: HTML (inline CSS), SVG, and plain text
- Palette commands (Screenshot: HTML/SVG/Text) trigger capture
- Buffer capture happens during view() via RefCell, consumed on next Tick
- Files saved to ~/Downloads with timestamped filenames (cass_screenshot_*)
- Toast notifications for success/failure feedback
- Graceful fallback message in legacy tui.rs mode

Also re-exports ftui-core animation primitives (Spring, Timeline,
AnimationGroup, StaggerMode, stagger_offsets) via ftui_adapter.rs.

Includes 7 unit tests covering: default enabled state, disabled snap behavior,
focus flash convergence, reveal stagger, modal open/close, panel ratio
interpolation, and peek badge show/hide.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
